key_concepts: Ordinal encoding maps string targets to integer variables (1, 2, 3), but tricks linear models into assuming rank.
One-hot encoding creates a binary column for every possible category, preventing linear confusion but expanding matrix width dramatically.
Tree based models can naturally handle ordinal numbers as category pointers without assuming numeric correlation.

definitions.definition: Mengubah satu lajur kategori menjadi banyak lajur fitur spesifik bernilai biner tunggal (1 atau 0).
Mengubah kategori ke nilai angka bulat berurutan.

examples: One-hot encoding applied to 'Color: Red, Blue, Green' creates three separate columns.
